title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 5–8, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Cocoyasi Village and nearby towns show the cost of Arlong’s occupation.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yo!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why's everyone all gathered here?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NYU!? ARLONG, YOU'RE BACK!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Welcome back!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whats this?

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: It's the work of that infamous pirate Hunter Zoro. Where were you, HACHi?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you were only here, this would've never happened.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Damn right! Like I would ever let the guy who offed my crewmates go scot-free!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Why that Zoro! I'll kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So you don't know anything about where Zoro could've gone to?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Nope, nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The only one I remember meeting was this rather suspicious lone swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Could it have been him!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So you did meet him, you dumbass!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Where did he go!?

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: I just gave him a ride to Cocoyashi Village...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You gave him a ride!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: B-But... It was only because I thought he was Arlong's guest,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: that I gave him a ride to the village so he could meet you.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I never thought you'd come back here so soon.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then that means there's no need for us to rush.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Because he's looking for me too...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Zoro's looking for Arlong!? What's he planning? He shouldn't have any reason to fight Arlong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...if I let things get any more out of hand than this, then I'll really be-in-trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: By the way, who's he?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He's Zoro's companion.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Even though he's just a human, he thought he could take on us fishmen.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Grab...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ughh!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: you...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You wanna fight, is that it!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You're a nuisance...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It's your own fault for going against Arlong...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's my fault that I let you guys follow me this far.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But there are certain rules on this island that you're all ignorant of.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Everything was going without a hitch until you guys got here.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I can't let you ruin the business I've been running for the past 8 years.

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
